title: centaurium quadrifolium f. rigualii
intro: Centaurium quadrifolium f. rigualii, also known as mountain centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurium quadrifolium f. rigualii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, often in traditional medicine and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
